student.name: Priya Sharma
student.lead_source: Watched NEET free lecture on YouTube

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, am I speaking with Priya Sharma? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. I noticed you watched NEET free lecture on YouTube — wanted to reach out and see how I can help.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan ji, main Priya bol rahi hun. Actually maine YouTube pe kuch videos dekhe the NEET ke liye. But I wasn't expecting any call...

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Oh sorry for the surprise call! Main bas check kar rahi thi ki aapko lectures helpful lage ya nahi. NEET ki preparation kaise chal rahi hai? Aap currently which class mein ho?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Main class 11 mein hun abhi. NEET ki preparation start ki hai but honestly thoda confusing lag raha hai. Itna syllabus hai na...

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul samajh sakti hun! Class 11 mein NEET prep start karna actually perfect timing hai. Aapke paas around 18 months ka time hai properly prepare karne ke liye. Kya aap currently koi coaching le rahe ho ya self-study kar rahe ho?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Abhi main mostly self-study kar rahi hun. Local coaching dekha tha but fees bahut zyada hai. YouTube videos se try kar rahi hun but structured approach nahi mil raha properly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's exactly where PhysicsWallah can help you! Humara NEET Yakeen 2027 course specially designed hai class 11 students ke liye. Complete structured approach milega with live classes, recorded lectures, doubt solving sessions, and regular tests. Interested ho aap is bare mein sunne ke liye?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan, sounds good. But main concern yahi hai ki fees affordable hogi ya nahi. Already bahut expensive coaching dekhe hain jo afford nahi kar sakte.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Don't worry about that! PhysicsWallah affordable education mein believe karta hai. NEET Yakeen 2027 course is just 33999 rupees for the complete program. And agar upfront payment issue hai, toh we offer 0% EMI at just 3299 rupees per month through PW Pay. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai!

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Oh, that's actually reasonable. 3299 per month toh manageable hai. But course mein exactly kya kya milega? And teachers kaun se hain?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great question! Course mein aapko milega - live interactive classes, recorded video lectures jo aap anytime access kar sakte ho, comprehensive study material, regular mock tests, doubt clearing sessions, and performance analysis. Teachers are experienced faculty jo already thousands of NEET qualifiers produce kar chuke hain. Would you like me to share more details about the curriculum?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan, curriculum ke bare mein batao. And kya main trial class le sakti hun before deciding? I mean, I am interested but I need to discuss with my parents first.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely! We do provide demo classes. Curriculum covers complete NEET syllabus - Physics, Chemistry, Biology with class 11 and 12 both years. Plus regular revision sessions and previous year question practice. Demo class book karne ke liye main aapka number note kar sakti hun? And parents ke saath discuss karna is completely fine.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan sure. My number is already with you I think since you called me. Demo class book kar do. And parents ko convince kaise karun for EMI option?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect! Demo class book kar dungi. Parents ko bata sakte ho ki it's 0% interest EMI, so no extra charges. Plus PW ka track record bahut strong hai - lakhs of students have cracked NEET through our courses. Cost per day calculate karenge toh it's just around 93 rupees daily for complete NEET preparation. Main aapko WhatsApp pe course details and demo class link send kar deti hun?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan please send kar do. I'll watch the demo class and then discuss with parents. If everything looks good, main enroll kar lungi next week.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect Priya! Main abhi WhatsApp pe demo class link and course brochure send karti hun. Demo class ke baad agar koi questions ho ya enrollment karna ho, toh directly mujhe call kar sakte ho. All the best for your NEET preparation! Any other questions right now?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Bas ek last question - agar mid-way mein koi problem aa jaye toh refund policy kya hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good question! Humari student-friendly refund policy hai. Agar course start hone ke 7 days ke andar aapko lagta hai ki course suitable nahi hai, toh full refund mil jata hai. Baaki specific cases mein partial refund bhi available hai. But I'm confident once you start, you'll love the teaching methodology!

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: That sounds fair. Okay Priya, thank you so much for the call. Main demo class dekhungi and parents se baat karke decide karungi. WhatsApp pe details send kar do please.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you so much Priya! Demo class link and details abhi send kar rahi hun WhatsApp pe. Feel free to reach out agar koi doubts ho. Looking forward to having you as part of PW family. Take care and all the best!

promised_actions: Send course details and enrollment link

slack_message.preview: 🔶 WARM lead: Priya Sharma, NEET, Class 11, Pune. Interested but needs nurturing. Follow up in 2 days.

email.subject: Continuing Your NEET Journey — PhysicsWallah
email.preview: Hi Priya, thank you for your time today. I understand you'd like to discuss with your family — I've attached our course guide to help with that conversation.

crm_record.lead_source: Watched NEET free lecture on YouTube
crm_record.notes: Interested but needs parental approval. Send materials, follow up in 2 days.
